Verified through the verify-gated loop: IMPL (ac6fb73a) -> orchestrator independently ran make verify-slice SLICE=fold_form exit 0 -> SEPARATE adversarial audit (a0e20af7) Total findings: 1 (no runtime guard for the dict-only form contract; a formset list[dict] raised a cryptic dict.update ValueError, a list[tuple] silently corrupted draft_state) -> IMPL round-2 (a32a7400, 2a7e1af) added an isinstance(prefill, dict) guard before any mutation raising a clear TypeError, + 2 tests proven RED on round-1 -> orchestrator re-ran the gate exit 0 -> re-audit (a9550ef1) Total findings: 0 (guard precedes mutation, both reject paths raise the clear TypeError with draft_state untouched, happy path intact, no over-correction, no new defects, gate not weakened). criteria_results.criterion: Folding a {field: value} form-step prefill (bare field names) into a draft_state sets each bare field key to its value.
Folding updates the given fields without clobbering unrelated pre-existing draft_state keys.
criteria_results.evidence: test_slice_fold_form_preserves_unrelated_keys (a milestones-0-label survives); audit probed overlap + unrelated keys live.

criteria_results.criterion: The folded draft_state round-trips through PlanDraftState save/load (equal) and, via build_grounding(include=['draft_state']), is read back with the folded form fields present and unchanged.
criteria_results.evidence: test_slice_fold_form_round_trips_through_store_and_grounding -- real parse_narrative -> fold -> save_version/load_latest -> build_grounding asserts folded fields + the unrelated key present. Non-vacuous (sabotage-to-no-op fails all 4).

criteria_results.criterion: The fold is a pure server-side transform importing no retired-workshop code.
criteria_results.evidence: planner/services.py imports only __future__ + typing; apply.py MERGE_RULES referenced in docstring only. Audit confirmed via imports + git diff.

criteria_results.criterion: The whole-project gate stays green and the context cascade validates; nothing pre-existing breaks.
